title: Individual Counseling * LGBTQ2+ Individuals - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Individual Counseling * LGBTQ2+ Individuals 4 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - AIDS/HIV Issues LGBTQ2+ Individuals LGBTQ2+ Issues Native American Community AIDS/HIV Issues Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF CASCADIA HEALTH CASCADIA PLAZA HEALTH CENTER CASCADIA CENTRAL INTAKE AND REFERRAL LINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides an intake line for services such as case management, individual, family, group, geriatric and LGBTQ counseling, alcohol and drug treatment services, DUII and gambling addiction/treatment services, recovery housing services, sexual abuse counseling, domestic violence services, urgent mental health services, medication management, money management, outreach, crisis intervention, outpatient mental health services, and early intervention services. Provides about 1000 units in sites operating as licensed residential, permanent supported housing, and independent housing. 4212 SE Division Street Suites 100 and 200 Portland, OR 97206 Eligibility: Varies by service Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (503) 674-7777 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CHARLIE HEALTH VIRTUAL ADULT INTENSIVE OUTPATIENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides virtual intensive outpatient counseling, including individual, group, and family therapy. Specialized tracks include trauma (such as survivors of sexual assault, domestic violence, and/or other complex trauma), LGBTQ2+, maternal mental health, and neurodivergent clients, including those with autism, ADHD, or other conditions, along with co-occurring mental health issues. Also provides participants with wrap-around support, including discharge planning, family support groups, and alumni support groups and events for participants. Also, provides specialized information and referrals on mental health resources. Eligibility: Ages 18-64 Hours: Intake: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week. Treatment: Varies by service Email (986) 206-0414 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ONE COMMUNITY HEALTH HOOD RIVER CLINIC LGBTQ2+ HEALTH CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a variety of services specifically for the LGBTQ2+ community, including gender-affirming care (initiation and maintenance of hormone therapy and referrals to gender-affirming care specialists), behavioral health providers with specialized training in LGBTQ2+ care, assistance with legal ID changes through the county, DMV, and passports, reproductive health care and STI screening. 849 Pacific Avenue Hood River, OR 97031 Eligibility: Varies by service, established One Community Health patients only Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-6pm, Saturday 8am-3pm On-call provider and nurse: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (541) 386-6380 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ONE COMMUNITY HEALTH THE DALLES CLINIC LGBTQ2+ HEALTH CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a variety of services specifically for the LGBTQ2+ community, including gender-affirming care (initiation and maintenance of hormone therapy and referrals to gender-affirming care specialists), behavioral health providers with specialized training in LGBTQ2+ care, assistance with legal ID changes through the county, DMV, and passports, reproductive health care and STI screening. 1040 Webber Street The Dalles, OR 97058 Eligibility: Varies by service, established One Community Health patients only Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-6pm, Saturday 8am-3pm On-call provider and nurse: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (541) 296-4610 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CASCADIA HEALTH CASCADIA CENTRAL INTAKE AND REFERRAL LINE ONE COMMUNITY HEALTH LGBTQ2+ HEALTH CARE ONE COMMUNITY HEALTH LGBTQ2+ HEALTH CARE
